# MailBridge

MailBridge is a free, high-performance transactional email and SMS API. Relay automated emails and SMS verification codes directly using Gmail SMTP with zero vendor costs.

## Key Resources
- [Home Page](https://mail-bridge.email/)
- [API Documentation](https://mail-bridge.email/docs)
- [Login Portal](https://mail-bridge.email/login)
- [Registration Portal](https://mail-bridge.email/register)
